title: R3PACK WP3 D3.3 Washers' audit grid to ensure safety
author: Céline CODINO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The objective of this report is to assess the food safety of reusable packaging by defining a comprehensive auditing protocol applicable to washing practices for industrial reuse. 
The task will work on to ensure the packaging’s food safety through an audit grid to control washing efficiency depending on the material. 
It will lead to the definition of an auditing protocol for washing centers for the different identified and analyzed reusable packaging options.
